postStartCommand: bash -c 'if ! docker image inspect arista/ceos:4.36.0F >/dev/null 2>&1; then ardl --token $ARISTA_TOKEN get eos --format cEOSarm --latest --import-docker && rm cEOSarm-lab*; fi && curl -sL https://github.com/siemens/edgeshark/raw/main/deployments/wget/docker-compose.yaml | DOCKER_DEFAULT_PLATFORM=linux/arm64 docker compose -f - up -d'
